 RECENT COMMENTS PROCESSED
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

[QUESTIONS] Curious Cat
  "How do I start building my own system like this?"
  → Auto-response template queued: "Thanks for the great question..."
  → Status: PROCESSED

[PRAISE] Fan True
  "This is absolutely amazing! So inspiring and brilliant!"
  → Auto-response template queued: "Thank you so much for the kind words..."
  → Status: PROCESSED

[SPAM] Crypto Trading Bot
  "BUY CRYPTO NOW!!! Limited offer, DM me for details"
  → Action: Logged (no response)
  → Status: SKIPPED

[SPAM] Business Joe (Partnership Inquiry)
  "Hey! I'd love to collaborate on a partnership opportunity. Can you DM me?"
  → Action: Flagged for manual review
  → Status: FLAGGED ⚠️
  → Reason: High-value potential partnership opportunity

[SALES] Jessica Parker (Partnership Inquiry)
  "Hi! Love your content. Would love to explore a partnership opportunity..."
  → Action: Flagged for manual review
  → Status: FLAGGED ⚠️
  → Reason: Partnership/collaboration request

[SPAM] Spam Bot
  "Buy crypto now!!! DM me for details on the new blockchain opportunity"
  → Action: Logged (no response)
  → Status: SKIPPED

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 AUTO-RESPONSE TEMPLATES IN USE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

QUESTIONS RESPONSE:
  "Thanks for the great question! We appreciate your interest. For detailed 
   answers, check out our help center or resources. We're here to help! 🙌"

PRAISE RESPONSE:
  "Thank you so much for the kind words! 🙏 Comments like yours keep us 
   motivated to create great content. We're so glad this resonated with you!"

SPAM KEYWORDS (Not Responded To):
  • crypto, nft, bitcoin
  • mlm, network marketing
  • forex, "dm me"
  • limited offer
  • blockchain opportunity

Locations:

  • Report (JSON):    .cache/youtube-comments-report-current.json
  • Execution Log:    .cache/youtube-comment-monitor-cron.log

Log Entry Format (JSONL):
  {
    "timestamp": "2026-04-18T07:00:00Z",
    "comment_id": "demo_q1",
    "commenter": "Curious Cat",
    "text": "How do I start building my own system like this?",
    "category": "questions",
    "response_status": "auto_responded",
    "template_response": "Thanks for the great question!...",
    "run_time": "2026-04-18T07:00:00Z"
  }

2. 🚩 Review flagged partnership inquiry from Jessica Parker

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 QUICK COMMANDS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# View latest report
cat .cache/youtube-comments-report-current.txt

# See all comments (formatted)
jq '.' .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | tail -50

# Find partnership opportunities
jq 'select(.category=="sales")' .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

# Count by category
jq '.category' .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | sort | uniq -c

# Watch live cron execution
tail -f .cache/youtube-comment-monitor-cron.log
